findings.title: Settlement: Agreement
findings.summary: tlement Stipulation, beginning on page 14. 4 additional components. The Phase-In description of the Settlement Agreement reads as follows: The Parties agree that OTP may file for the establishment of a phase-in rate plan under SDCL 49-34A-73 through 78, seeking recovery
